body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-7301", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "SGLang's multimodal generation runtime scheduler's ROUTER socket binds to 0.0.0.0 by default and contains a sink that calls pickle.loads() on incoming messages, enabling RCE when exposed to the internet.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00399, "percentile": 0.3161}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gwv6-pq6m-p3rq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-29T17:23:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gwv6-pq6m-p3rq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gwv6-pq6m-p3rq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7301"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-18T12:16:16Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T12:31:47Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7301", "https://antiproof.ai/blog/three-rces-in-sglang", "https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/tree/main/python/sglang", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gwv6-pq6m-p3rq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang", "summary": "SGLanG: Multimodal scheduler deserializes untrusted pickle data on 0.0.0.0 ROUTER socket", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T17:23:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gwv6-pq6m-p3rq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "sglang"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.5.5, <= 0.5.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
